channel.title: Tesla Shorts Time — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts from Tesla Shorts Time podcast episodes. Daily Tesla news digest and podcast.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: NHTSA has escalated its investigation into Tesla's Full Self-Driving software to the engineering analysis phase.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: NHTSA has upgraded its investigation into how Tesla FSD handles glare and low-visibility conditions across 3.2 million vehicles.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX launched the Terafab project to build vertically integrated AI chip production on a massive scale.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Canada is investing $200 million in its own Spaceport Nova Scotia to cut reliance on SpaceX for future launches.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Elon Musk confirms Tesla's Terafab AI chip plant starts production in just seven days.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's latest software update brings Comfort Braking to Model Y, enhancing smoother stops for owners.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla gains a stake in SpaceX by converting its $2B xAI investment, deepening ties between Musk's companies.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla is ramping up Cybercab production to hundreds weekly at its Austin factory ahead of launch.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla ramps up Cybercab testing on public roads as it queues for mass production.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla loses two long-time executives, including finance VP Sendil Palani after 17 years and OTA director Thomas Dmytryk after 11 years.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's FSD tech is now called more revolutionary than the iPhone by experts, sparking major buzz.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla patents breakthrough dry electrode process for cheaper, cleaner battery production.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's patent for a one-piece composite seat signals the next-gen Roadster is nearing its debut.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's Giga Berlin workers elect 'Giga United' majority, signaling a shift away from union influence.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Automakers are exiting Tesla's EU carbon credit pool, which could squeeze a key revenue stream worth billions.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla raised the Cybertruck's entry price to $69,990 just 10 days after its $59,990 launch, signaling strong initial demand.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla raised the Cybertruck AWD price by $10K to $69,990 after strong initial demand.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's FSD (Supervised) fleet hits 8.4 billion cumulative miles, closing in on the 10 billion needed for unsupervised autonomy.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla confirms upgraded black headliner and 16-inch screen for new Model Y orders in Canada, enhancing customer appeal.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's new affordable Cybertruck variant sees delivery estimates pushed to April 2027 amid surging demand.
